title: Tech for Jobs: Data Analytics Program
desc: Completed 250 hours of training in data analytics including Python, SQL, data visualization, and statistical analysis. Built and presented real-world data projects with hands-on experience in EDA, hypothesis testing, and data-driven storytelling.

title: Data Science Training Program
desc: Completed 90 hours of hands-on training in Python, statistics, SQL, and machine learning. Developed supervised/unsupervised models and data pipelines applied to real-world projects in healthcare, business, and public sector domains.

title: Data Analytics & Business Intelligence Technology Pathway
desc: Mastered end-to-end analytics and BI techniques including probability, statistics, hypothesis testing, and data modeling. Developed proficiency in Python, Excel, Jupyter Notebooks, and Power BI.

title: OCI Generative AI Professional
desc: Deep understanding of Generative AI on Oracle Cloud including LLMs, prompt engineering, fine-tuning, and RAG-based chatbot development using LangChain. Covered model security, scalability, and deployment on OCI.
